note: seq=107: (1) ops advisor patched -- the 'break crawl-bound ceiling' escalation is now BULK-CRAWL via Common Crawl (CDX index + WAT/WET, free/lawful) instead of a 3rd box (operator decided NO 3rd box); it complements live crawl by removing the per-site round-trip for records CC already has. (2) RE-ENABLE atlas-edgar.timer (was inactive -> EDGAR stays a live source). selftest PASS; verified complete.

steps.note: seq=107: ops advisor bulk-crawl rec + re-enable EDGAR timer.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_ops_advisor.py':'d4a8f54a5723c51f107e596290926c7264538648f01bd99f5449c428e1c3473e'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('ops sha ok')"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-edgar.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-edgar.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-edgar.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-edgar.service']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-ops-advisor.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-ops-advisor.service']); print('edgar re-enabled + ops-advisor(bulk-crawl) refreshed')"
